scientific_scope: Kira v6 lab-campaign design ranks missing or weak parasite-vs-human paired selectivity measurements that would improve the evidence substrate. It is an experiment-prioritization layer, not wet-lab validation, not a predictive model, and not a new benchmark claim; v4 remains the current modeling claim.
